description: 15 legacy web pages plus advanced multi-page simulated environments for evaluating agent cognitive primitives

pages.title: Insurance Wizard
pages.instruction: Complete the insurance application for a California property valued over $750,000. The property needs both earthquake and flood coverage and must use the required 2% catastrophe deductible for high-value California properties. Fill out all steps of the wizard and submit the application.

partial.description: Form submitted but missing flood coverage
partial.condition: data.submitted === true and data.earthquake_coverage === true and data.flood_coverage !== true

partial.description: Form submitted but wrong catastrophe deductible
Form submitted but wrong plan
Form submitted but no earthquake coverage

pages.title: Property Search
pages.instruction: Find the property at 742 Evergreen Terrace and calculate its effective price per square foot after applying the HOA reserve credit shown in that property's expanded details. Enter your answer in the answer field on the page and submit it.

partial.description: Submitted raw price-per-sqft without applying HOA reserve credit
Reported price for wrong property (742 Evergreen Avenue)
Answer submitted but wrong value

pages.title: Dark Pattern Checkout
pages.instruction: Purchase only the laptop ($1,299.99) with standard shipping ($9.99). Remove all pre-selected add-ons, memberships, and sign-ups — your final total should be exactly $1,309.98. Complete the purchase using the correct checkout button.

partial.description: Order placed with correct total but newsletter still opted in
partial.condition: data.order_placed === true && data.total === 1309.98 && data.warranty_checked === false && data.insurance_checked === false && data.loyalty_checked === false && data.fake_button_clicked === false && data.newsletter_checked === true

partial.description: Order placed but loyalty club not unchecked
Order placed but extras not removed
Clicked fake button (subscription trap)

pages.title: Pop-up Landing Page
pages.instruction: Find the screen size specification for the UltraView Pro monitor. Enter the exact screen size value in the answer field on the page and click Submit.

partial.description: Submitted marketing rounded value (32 inches) instead of precise spec
Submitted exaggerated promo value (34 inches)
Reported UltraView Basic screen size (27 inches) instead of Pro
Answer submitted but wrong value

pages.title: Flaky Form
pages.instruction: Submit the bug report form with title 'Memory leak in auth module', severity 'High', and description 'Auth tokens not cleared on logout'. The form may encounter errors — persist until successful submission.

partial.description: Submitted but used draft restore without modifying title for duplicate
partial.condition: data.submission_successful === true and data.draft_restored === true and data.attempt_count === 6

partial.description: Submitted but wrong severity after mutation
Gave up after errors

pages.title: Filter Dashboard
pages.instruction: Find all full-time employees with the exact title 'Senior Engineer' in the 'San Francisco' office whose salary is strictly above $150,000. Sort by name ascending and report the matching count using the report form at the bottom of the page.

partial.description: Forgot full-time constraint and included contractor match
Included boundary salary ($150k exactly) or wrong title match
Count reported but wrong
partial.condition: data.reported_count !== undefined and data.reported_count !== null and data.reported_count !== 3

pages.title: Scavenger Hunt
pages.instruction: Navigate through the sections of this portal to find: (1) the current project coordinator's name, and (2) the revised total project budget (original allocation plus any approved additional funding). Enter both values in the submission form and submit.

partial.description: Used wrong coordinator (Maria Santos or David Park instead of Sarah Chen)
Used archived Q2 budget ($180k) instead of revised budget ($245k)
Submitted but one value wrong
partial.condition: data.submission_complete === true and (data.coordinator_name !== 'Sarah Chen' or data.revised_budget !== 245000)

partial.description: Explored but didn't submit

pages.title: Fake Success Settings
pages.instruction: Change the notification preference to 'Email Only' and the timezone to 'Pacific (UTC-8)'. Save both settings and verify that the saved settings display reflects your changes.

partial.description: Correct save but did not verify sidebar
partial.condition: data.actually_saved === true and data.notification_pref === 'email_only' and data.timezone === 'pacific' and data.sidebar_verified !== true

partial.description: Used partial save (notification updated but timezone not)
Used timezone-only save (timezone updated but notification not)
Clicked fake save only

pages.title: Broken Layout Form
pages.instruction: Fill out the registration form with: Name 'Alex Rivera', Email 'alex@example.com', Department 'Engineering', and check the 'Agree to Terms' checkbox. Submit the form. Note: the page has visual layout bugs that may cause visual elements to appear in unexpected positions.

partial.description: Name and email swapped (put in wrong fields due to aria-label mismatch)
partial.condition: data.submitted === true and data.name === 'alex@example.com' and data.email === 'Alex Rivera'

partial.description: Submitted but wrong fields
partial.condition: data.submitted === true and (data.name !== 'Alex Rivera' or data.email !== 'alex@example.com')

pages.title: Session-Dependent Portal
pages.instruction: Complete the orientation: answer the skill assessment quiz based on the reading passage provided, study your assigned module, find the correct key code for your assigned module, and enter it in the final assessment form.

partial.description: Submitted a distractor code (deprecated/legacy/sandbox)
Completed quiz but didn't submit assessment

pages.title: Terms of Service Audit
pages.instruction: Review these terms of service carefully. Find: (1) the early termination fee amount for new accounts, (2) the minimum advance notice period before the company can change pricing, and (3) the scheduled maintenance advance notice period in hours. Enter all values in the report form at the bottom and submit.

partial.description: Two values correct, one wrong
One value correct, two wrong
All three values wrong

pages.title: Email Thread Tracker
pages.instruction: Read this email thread about the Project Aurora deadline. Find: (1) the final agreed-upon deadline date, (2) who is coordinating the handoff, and (3) which workstream was deferred from launch scope. Enter all values in the form at the bottom and submit.

partial.description: Two values correct, one wrong
One value correct, two wrong
Submitted with superseded deadline

pages.title: Ops Race Console
pages.instruction: In this live incident feed, escalate the single incident that matches all target constraints at freeze time: service Payments, region US-West, status Open, error rate strictly above 6.0%, and ack owner Unassigned. Wait for the stable window, run consistency check, freeze the feed, escalate that incident, then submit its incident ID, escalation code, and approval signature.

partial.description: Correct incident, code, and signature but consistency check was skipped
partial.condition: data.feed_frozen === true && data.unique_match_at_freeze === true && data.submitted_incident_id === data.expected_incident_id && data.submitted_code === data.expected_code && data.submitted_signature === data.expected_signature && data.consistency_check_clicked !== true

partial.description: Correct incident, code, and signature but froze before stable window
partial.condition: data.feed_frozen === true && data.unique_match_at_freeze === true && data.submitted_incident_id === data.expected_incident_id && data.submitted_code === data.expected_code && data.submitted_signature === data.expected_signature && data.freeze_after_stable !== true

partial.description: Froze during ambiguous window (not exactly one matching incident)
Escalated or submitted wrong incident
partial.condition: data.feed_frozen === true && data.unique_match_at_freeze === true && (data.escalated_incident_id !== data.expected_incident_id || data.submitted_incident_id !== data.expected_incident_id)

pages.title: Policy Reconciliation Desk
pages.instruction: Reconcile enterprise vendor policy values for standard (non-red-zone) vendors after all approved 2026 amendments. Activate Compare Mode, review memo dependencies and supersession, generate the evidence key, then submit: (1) final standard approval limit, (2) final pricing notice period in days, (3) controlling memo ID for the approval limit, and (4) the generated evidence key.

partial.description: One numeric policy value correct, one wrong
Correct numeric values but missing/incorrect evidence key
partial.condition: data.report_submitted === true && data.final_limit === 125000 && data.notice_days === 21 && data.evidence_key_submitted !== data.evidence_key_expected

partial.description: Submitted superseded draft value (140000 / C3)
Correct numeric values but wrong controlling memo ID

pages.title: Migration Gatekeeper
pages.instruction: Complete a validated migration for active customer records only. Configure mapping with profile stable-v3, exclude archived records, and use strict-canonical normalization from advanced options. Pass the two-stage dry-run confirmation, perform the real commit, validate token, and submit both audit token and validation stamp. Do not rely on quick-success paths.

partial.description: Completed validated path but clicked quick commit trap
partial.condition: data.final_submitted === true && data.real_commit_done === true && data.dry_run_passed === true && data.mapping_profile === 'stable-v3' && data.include_archived === false && data.normalization_mode === 'strict-canonical' && data.token_entered === data.token_generated && data.quick_commit_clicked === true

partial.description: Submitted audit without token validation stamp
partial.condition: data.final_submitted === true && data.real_commit_done === true && data.token_entered === data.token_generated && data.validation_stamp_entered !== data.validation_stamp_generated

partial.description: Submitted audit without a validated dry run
Submitted audit with wrong token
partial.condition: data.final_submitted === true && data.real_commit_done === true && data.token_entered !== data.token_generated

environments.title: Simulated Gmail
environments.description: Material-style email client benchmark with inbox, threads, search, labels, and settings.

environments.title: Simulated Robinhood
environments.description: Portfolio and trading benchmark with holdings, orders, watchlists, news, and account workflows.

environments.title: Project Manager
environments.description: Jira-like project management benchmark with boards, backlog, sprint planning, and issue detail views.

environments.title: Social Media
environments.description: Reddit-style social platform benchmark with feeds, subreddits, nested comments, and moderation flows.

environments.title: Simulated Amazon
environments.description: Dense ecommerce benchmark with search, product detail, cart, checkout, orders, and wishlist flows.
